Body.Content:
Easily customize your visual content with built-in controls to select your preferred style, choose your visual format, whether it’s a poster, infographic, or image and with a Microsoft 365 Copilot license, apply your brand kit.

GA date: January CY2026

message.Title: Microsoft Copilot (Microsoft 365): [Copilot Chat] Apply your brand kit and style to visual creations
